triage_rows.direction: keep_the_outer_orchestrator_on_steady supervision when orchestration_mode remains steady_orchestration
tighten_outer supervision and shorten orchestration cadence when orchestration_mode rotates into tight_orchestration
interrupt_the_outer orchestration loop immediately when orchestration_mode rotates into interrupt_orchestration

interpretation: This is the highest orchestration-facing packet in the internal hot-news stack.
An external orchestrator can stop here without reading lower scheduler or runtime layers unless it needs detail.
